name: Import Valid Youtube Video -- @1.2
fullName: Import and Delete Youtube Video/Short Video: Import Valid Youtube Video

steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
Given user navigates to "import" section of create
When user enters "https://youtube.com/shorts/9Ox_gZptJVY?si=_-lkJNF2l30_kcrs" in textbox and hits import button
Then user verifies video on redirected page

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Import and Delete Youtube Video/Short Video
